name: CheckSmart
description_short: Mesa, AZ's CheckSmart at 6771 E Main St offers check cashing and quick loans with convenient weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
Located at 6771 E Main St on Mesa's east side, CheckSmart is a standalone check-cashing store serving the local community. This Mesa location operates Monday through Saturday with hours designed for convenience—9 AM–7 PM on most weekdays, with slightly reduced hours on Wednesdays and Thursdays, plus 10 AM–4 PM on Saturdays. The accessible Mesa storefront makes it easy to stop by without planning ahead.

At this CheckSmart location in Mesa, AZ, you can cash checks, apply for short-term loans, and access other quick-financing options. Call +1 480-981-6999 to ask about services, rates, and eligibility requirements. The 6771 E Main St branch staff can explain your loan options and guide you through the application process quickly.

If you're in Mesa and need fast access to cash, bring a valid government ID and a recent pay stub or bank statement. CheckSmart provides a faster alternative to banks for short-term funding needs. The convenient Saturday hours and east Mesa location make this branch ideal for residents throughout the city.
pros: Multiple financial services under one roof: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay, and loan access
Extended hours including Friday 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM and Sunday 11:00 AM - 5:00 PM for accessibility
Online appointment scheduling available to reduce in-store wait times
Quick lending decision and same-day/next-day funding potential for approved loans
Green Dot Visa debit card issuance available in-store
Gift card exchange service for cash—uncommon convenience service
Multiple locations across Ohio (11+ stores) providing neighborhood access
cons: Acts as a lending facilitator, not a direct lender—terms and rates controlled by third-party lenders with unknown APRs
Website provides no specific information about loan amounts, terms, fees, or eligibility requirements
Requires in-person store visit; no online loan application capability mentioned
Limited transparency about the third-party lending partners or their specific products
Check-cashing and money services typically carry per-transaction fees not disclosed on the website
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing and money transfer services in one location
Columbus-area residents seeking same-day loan access with quick approval decisions
Customers who prefer in-person financial service interactions with appointment flexibility
People needing bundled services: loan application, bill payment, and debit card access simultaneously
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best suited for consumers needing quick access to check-cashing services, money transfers, or bill payment in a physical location, with potential loan access through third-party lenders. The main caveat is the lack of transparency regarding specific loan products, APRs, and terms—borrowers must visit in-store or call to learn actual lending details.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card issuance
Third-party short-term loan access and application
meta_description: CheckSmart at 6771 E Main St, Mesa, AZ. Check cashing & loans with weekday & Saturday hours.
